name: jax-ml-workspace
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p /root/.claude && [ -f /root/.claude/.claude.json ] || echo '{"hasCompletedOnboarding":true,"installMethod":"native"}' > /root/.claude/.claude.json && ln -sf /root/.claude/.claude.json /root/.claude.json && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash && ln -sf /root/.local/bin/claude /usr/local/bin/claude && pip3 install --break-system-packages pylatexenc || true && rtk init -g --auto-patch || true && WANDB_KEY=$(python3 -c "import json; c=json.load(open('/root/.claude/.claude.json')); print(c.get('mcpServers',{}).get('wandb',{}).get('headers',{}).get('Authorization','').replace('Bearer ',''))" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$WANDB_KEY" ] && echo "export WANDB_API_KEY=$WANDB_KEY" >> /root/.bashrc || true
